items.label: Create Vault post
items.description: Create the Vault heist post for this subreddit

items.label: [DEV ONLY] Give yourself 1000 coins
items.description: Credits your own coin balance for testing shop unlocks (skins, scenery). Only works on the dev test subreddit — remove before a real launch.

items.label: [DEV ONLY] Clear my leaderboard entry today
items.description: Wipes your own today's leaderboard score (and today's ghost replay, if it was yours) for clean ghost racer re-testing. Only works on the dev test subreddit — remove before a real launch.

items.label: [DEV ONLY] Bump first obstacle to death threshold
items.description: Sets today's death count for the first obstacle to the marker threshold, so the community death-marker badge can be tested without dying there repeatedly. Only works on the dev test subreddit — remove before a real launch.
